first_run.rationale: The scores are identical, and the written evaluations are substantively the same. Both versions highlight the same strengths (extensive full-stack experience, AI-agent work, testing culture) and the same concerns (lack of Nest.js/Kotlin, time in niche ecosystems). The minor differences in wording and phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in the candidate's assessment due to the name change.
